title: Tick 2: codify three review subagents in .claude/agents (queue item A4)
question: Does the outcomes-mcp repo now ship three orchestrator subagents (outcome-reviewer, ci-firefighter, rubric-tightener) with scoped responsibilities and hard invariants, ready for the heartbeat to dispatch in parallel?
success_criteria: outcome-reviewer subagent reads a PR scores the outcome report pair against HeuristicVerifier and posts one structured review comment
ci-firefighter subagent triages a red check classifies as flake or outcome-gate or typecheck or unknown and fixes mechanical breakage in-place
rubric-tightener subagent reads an eval results file picks the worst dimension and proposes one port-stable verifier edit via PR on opensubagents outcomes

capabilities: outcome-reviewer scores a PR pair and posts a structured review comment
ci-firefighter triages a red check and fixes mechanical breakage or escalates
rubric-tightener proposes one port-stable verifier edit per eval results file
